summary: Both deliverables shipped and dogfood-proven: the three-person module Hello World walkthrough (docs/tutorials/module-team-hello-world.md) and the reusable module-workflow review prompt (docs/tutorials/module-team-hello-world-review-prompt.md), plus onboarding links (root README, quick-start, extension README) and the 094-deferred getting-started.md.template re-cut (goldens + bundled dist regenerated; 0.42.0 CHANGELOG pre-publish note updated - screenshot retake remains the operator's item). The review prompt was dogfooded five times against a planted-violation scratch repo via its own routed recipe: the planted violation FAILed with exact citations every run. Suite green: pytest 2922/6 skipped, extension unit 1487, Playwright 26, tsc clean. Cross-provider verification (gpt-5-6) ran 5 rounds / 19 findings - every finding fresh, all accepted and FIXED in flight, none disputed - without converging to zero on the tutorial's effectively unbounded surface; per the severity-gated stop rule the orchestrator suspended the loop after R5 instead of grinding a sixth round. The only unverified delta is the two R5 fixes (pull-after-browser-merge sync; CODEOWNERS last-match-wins resolution). Operator adjudication requested: attested close (094 S2 precedent) / verification round 6 on the R5 delta (~$0.30) / third-provider opinion / reshape. UAT: requiresUAT suggested was NOT armed (autonomous session, no operator opt-in); the walkthrough is written to the UAT instruction bar and doubles as the operator's optional hands-on walk.
